/usr/bin/clang  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/RayTracer.dir/src/main.m.o CMakeFiles/RayTracer.dir/src/AppDelegate.m.o CMakeFiles/RayTracer.dir/src/Renderer.m.o -o RayTracer.app/Contents/MacOS/RayTracer  -framework Metal -framework MetalKit -framework Cocoa -framework QuartzCore
